title: Do not strip binaries
body:
We should not strip binaries in Make. That should be left to packages.  Also,
we can not debug stripped binaries so this allows us to debug better as well.

Signed-off-by: baude <bbaude@redhat.com>

comments.body: Looks like we're getting bit by unrelated build environment issues.
Change LGTM, @lsm5 any concerns with this from the packaging side?  I think it's good, but would feel better with a +1 from you.
I don' think this is an issue with rpms, but we need to make sure we ship this executables as small as possible.
RPM will do the stripping after the build.

:pushpin: Commit f9d7179 has been approved by `rhatdan`
